value.found_quote: OpenAI's Moderation API is free-to-use and can help reduce the frequency of unsafe content in your completions. ... you can also request moderation scores in the generation request
value.rationale: The page explicitly confirms that OpenAI offers a free Moderation API that reduces unsafe content in completions, and further states that moderation scores can be requested on generated content. This directly substantiates both aspects of the claim: (1) it is free, (2) it reduces unsafe content in completions, and (3) it provides moderation scores on generated content.
